channel.title: Upgrade on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Upgrade on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: ASP.NET Core 2.3 end of support announcement
item.description:
ASP.NET Core 2.3 will reach end of support on April 7, 2027. Microsoft says users should plan to upgrade applications to a currently supported .NET version.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Blue-green agent pool upgrade in AKS
item.description:
Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) now offers a public preview of blue-green agent pool upgrades. The feature creates a parallel node pool with the new configuration so you can validate it before moving workloads, reducing risk from in-place upgrades.

  • Source: Azure Updates
